settings.heading: From three friends to 50,000+ feet on every coast.
settings.text: Built by surfers. Tested by the rest of us.
Your feet shouldn't slow you down.

Three friends, one bad pair of beach shoes, and hundreds of prototypes later — FirstT was born. Today, our shoes are tested by the people who use them most: surf instructors in Bali, paddleboard guides in Tahoe, and reef divers in the Florida Keys. Every detail is for a reason.

settings.heading: Engineered grip on the outside, barefoot feel inside.
settings.text: We obsess over every gram. Our outsole is a multi-density rubber compound with directional lugs that bite into wet rock and coral. The upper is a single-piece knit polyester that drains in seconds and never lets a grain of sand get stuck.
The most comfortable water shoes I've owned, hands down.
settings.name: Sarah K.

settings.text: I wear them daily. The grip on lava rock saved my ankles in Hawaii.
settings.name: Marcus T.

settings.text: Compliments everywhere I go. Teal goes with everything.
settings.name: Emma R.

settings.heading: Stories, drops, and 10% off your first pair
settings.text: Field tests, athlete dispatches, and early access. No spam.
